textByHashes.57fe6e4ca024ad16a37adfd5f0f6388781c9c1df: Hi there, nice to see you! Care for a mug of beer?
textByHashes.940b5fc70424c7f708bea2c99afe448a6bd76ad1: Can I interest you in a drink?
textByHashes.0a130c50034c3b2e6b36fecc7ea0c524ec5ce70f: I do! He's just over there. Lovely guy.
textByHashes.4219ce783daff2f49d9676b2dcd2b47d6651a9dd: Now that you mention it, yes he does.
textByHashes.affc2cbbfb8f55f6f3119910ef8275a8ec9298b9: He was always so cheery, bouncing around like a fuzzy avatar of joy.
textByHashes.e0b2053aef304d8f7fac64394a2322709754e1e8: He's been in a sorry state lately though.
textByHashes.c3cde8ab0ef40fa34eaf666af7280c11fd50cbb3: Hmm... He used to drink pint after pint of carrot juice! Barely sips the stuff now though, just stares into the glass.
textByHashes.118652cd6d3c9453f1fbe2aa1f172f7b42400104: Absolutely! One C.J. coming right up!
textByHashes.83c061cffec9d71dcafe58866df8984275643798: Good right? I make it myself.
textByHashes.732761082a3ea43013604d0a01138e679a72db83: I put some carrots into a juice press, then add some good old-fashioned elbow grease.
textByHashes.f27c22f24a39932adf47b170a02bd8b22d1f4309: You can ask Weasel in the kitchen, he chooses which carrots get used for juice.
textByHashes.7cefa28ed0af109b5c5e845baabe25f18c917001: Be warned though, he's not much of a people person.
textByHashes.584d2fa45f0ed30c1d485a1baab5c75404f56124: Oh you'll soon find out! Don't worry though, just tell him I sent you and that you're trying to help the Easter Bunny.
textByHashes.8aadb4d38cf6badb0ce7d8c6926035fbd20bb86e: He'll give you some fantastic carrots.
textByHashes.4efae151856bca924e988df67b98d839a6d3a980: Once you have them, you can use the juice press to extract their goodness!
textByHashes.8f282d1d66cb0839f880fa7ff7fcd24ccb826dfc: Have you been to see Weasel in the kitchen about those nice carrots yet?
textByHashes.14eb540fabb5041f6416bda2612dc4e54bc98d2f: Well there's no need to be scared of him! Fetch some carrots and I'll let you use my juice press.
textByHashes.661185f8edbadba2d48406c90118ed5f0d08f4ea: You drank the juice didn't you?
textByHashes.a3f95722145c490607675ab942af6b79b65977b4: Right well you best go see Weasel again, but he won't be happy.
textByHashes.0d896b6a61e466d6c5ffb77e751ba5e944186da0: Hah! Good point! Best hurry along now!
textByHashes.d28b25c1279f770e0f3853e9ee404d08554b2d7f: Ooh look at those carrots, fantastic! This juice is sure to be a treat.
textByHashes.4c42f79bcad92846138fe69a011f349c5c940aad: You'll need a special glass for the juice, come back when you have space for one.
textByHashes.9ef9b5f60542c505648aff33356e63c5fd8c861f: Here's a carrot juice glass, make sure you use this!
textByHashes.068ba131b8763e7ebf32a9417ae90fadc0a112c2: Ha! Just a beer glass! You're a real joker!
textByHashes.b4400c7c89e2caed05d2b53d652d05f8500fa967: It's VERY important that you use the correct glassware.
textByHashes.223427ec3da98866bbf0fff03b1894f26f3ca53c: The juice press is in the storage room behind the bar. Have fun, and don't make too much mess!
textByHashes.5f3f6b639fe892a9e5035276cf0c9703652d3de1: Lost or broke? I'm not stupid. Those glasses are expensive you know!
textByHashes.63981972a0999bb9eac8607ba08abb9524c9c62c: Make some room for a new one and you can, yes.
textByHashes.be82d93bc4b35b5111aa0f72c0e04c342e37411c: Yes you can, but take care of it this time!
textByHashes.41381a9daebd415e2aa4dc6432f0be10fb79fa35: Well hurry up, we don't want to keep the Easter Bunny waiting!
textByHashes.a74d2f9ce2af54ccbe8fbc38077522c96cfa1c2d: Remember, the juice press is in the storage area behind the bar.
textByHashes.3f556d2e1d3aabdf3d896657d6e43bbd960aac4e: Then why are you still here?
textByHashes.7dae69d776405590976a6ba73e3659371a4c9d60: Ohhhh! Look at that juice! Such colour. It smells divine too.
textByHashes.380e22e9cb35c1d3c7537d57b10e6fbfce3ce9fe: Well let's see what the Easter Bunny thinks.
textByHashes.3f78d19a7c37cc436a940358c6d123cd5d2817c9: Oh yes of course, we keep plenty behind the bar for cocktails.
textByHashes.695fbd7c9430bf3db2a684445bb9dd871e2991ef: Of course I can't give you the spices unless you can carry them. Come back when you have space!
textByHashes.75c91f7b98d077216709d0caff0d36525ceeb114: There you go, I hope they work well!
textByHashes.074f59bd61524abf03d50ff0357a8f3f6c1ec3b6: I bet those spices will bring those buns to life!
